src/main/java/tr/org/lider/controllers/A.general_idea: Apply consistent whitespace and formatting standards.
Replace hardcoded role strings with constants from a dedicated class to improve maintainability.
Add OpenAPI 3.0 annotations to document the controller and its endpoints for API consumers.
Introduce SLF4J logger instance for debugging and error tracking within the controller.
Switch from field injection to constructor-style field injection with private final modifiers for better encapsulation.
Wrap return values in ResponseEntity to explicitly control HTTP status codes and headers.
Return explicit 404 Not Found response instead of null when an agent is not found.
Add a new endpoint to export filtered agent lists to Excel files.

Replace deprecated @RequestMapping with specific @PostMapping annotation to align with modern Spring MVC practices.
Replace field-based @Autowired injection with constructor-based injection for better testability and immutability.
Add OpenAPI 3 annotations (io.swagger.v3.oas) to document the REST API endpoints.
Implement Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) logic including OTP generation and verification endpoints.
Add support for JWT refresh tokens to allow token renewal without re-authentication.
Implement a dedicated logout endpoint to invalidate tokens and clear security context.
Integrate JCache (JSR-107) to cache JWT tokens and user passwords for session management.
Update logging statements to use SLF4J parameterized logging instead of string concatenation.
Refactor exception handling to use specific HTTP status codes and a dedicated handler method for authentication exceptions.
